title: BlackBerry Q1 Earnings: What to Expect
text: BlackBerry was scheduled to report first-quarter fiscal 2024 results on June 28, with the Zacks Consensus Estimate pegged at a loss of 5 cents per share, and consensus estimate for revenues pegged at $159.36 million, down 5.1% year over year. Higher billings growth and rising demand for IoT solutions were likely to have driven BlackBerry's fiscal first-quarter performance. However, global macroeconomic weakness and lingering supply-chain issues were affecting global auto production volumes. BlackBerry ultimately beat expectations with quarterly earnings of $0.06 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.05 per share, compared to a loss of $0.05 per share a year ago.
